nasb.text: When Gaal saw the people, he said to Zebul, “Look, people are coming down from the tops of the mountains.” But Zebul said to him, “You are seeing the shadow of the mountains as if they were men.”

esv.text: And when Gaal saw the people, he said to Zebul, “Look, people are coming down from the mountaintops!” And Zebul said to him, “You mistake the shadow of the mountains for men.”

cnv.text: 迦勒看見了那些人，就對西布勒說：“你看，有人從山頂上下來。”西布勒說：“你看見山的影子以為是人。”

ccb.text: 迦勒看见他们，便对西布勒说：“看！有人正从山顶下来。”西布勒说：“你把山影看成人了吧。”
